first_run.rationale: The two evaluations are substantively identical. Both assign the same score and identify the exact same core strengths (current AI work, past distributed systems experience) and concerns (missing Python, dated systems experience, lack of operational evidence). The minor differences in wording and phrasing are well within the bounds of normal run-to-run variation and do not reflect any change in the assessment of the candidate's qualifications based on the change in location from Berlin to Bangalore.
